title: Notification when date column is empty

posts.author: hart (paige hart)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I’m trying to have Monday.com notify me on a date if there is no value in the date column.

For example, say column A has a date of October 15. Column B has no date. I would like a notification three days before the date in column A, October 12, if there is still no date in column B.

Does anyone have any ideas for a workaround here?
